creator: liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
text:
Fix with portlint tool. Thanks.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112607

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	openldev
#	openldev/Makefile
#	openldev/distinfo
#	openldev/pkg-descr
#	openldev/pkg-plist
#
echo c - openldev
mkdir -p openldev > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - openldev/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >openldev/Makefile << 'END-of-openldev/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	openldev
X# Date created:		11 May 2007
X# Whom:			Yinghong.Liu <liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	openldev
XPORTVERSION=	1.0
XCATEGORIES=	devel gnome
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
X
XMAINTAINER=	liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
XCOMMENT=	A graphical front-end g++/gcc development environment compiler
X
XUSE_BZIP2=	yes
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf:259 automake:19 aclocal:19
XUSE_GNOME=	gnomeprefix intlhack gnomehack gtk20 gtksourceview \
X		gnomevfs2 vte libglade2 libgnomeui
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XMAN1=		openldev.1
X
X#CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
X#		LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|wait.h|sys/wait.h|' \
X		${WRKSRC}/openldev/openldev-file.h
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|naclocal|n${ACLOCAL}|' \
X		-e 's|nautomake|n${AUTOMAKE}|' \
X		-e 's|nautoconf|n${AUTOCONF}|' \
X		${WRKSRC}/templates/console-c/console-c.pl \
X		${WRKSRC}/templates/console-cxx/console-cxx.pl \
X		${WRKSRC}/templates/gtk/gtk.pl
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|share/man/man1|man/man1|' \
X		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
X
Xrun-autotools::
X	${DO_NADA}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-openldev/Makefile
echo x - openldev/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >openldev/distinfo << 'END-of-openldev/distinfo'
XMD5 (openldev-1.0.tar.bz2) = e5345d18b6f7cafcac85e3ce66b33217
XSHA256 (openldev-1.0.tar.bz2) = 79c0bda60e29a1a94e3873b20a0b70f1f2d95a3f0e90b1e8131652e990549bfb
XSIZE (openldev-1.0.tar.bz2) = 393000
END-of-openldev/distinfo
echo x - openldev/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >openldev/pkg-descr << 'END-of-openldev/pkg-descr'
XOpen Linux Developer is a development environment that provides a graphical 
Xfront-end to the Linux compilers gcc and g++ as well as support for GTK+ 
Xdevelopment. It includes the basic essentials needed by a programmer.
X
XWWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/openldev/
END-of-openldev/pkg-descr
echo x - openldev/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >openldev/pkg-plist << 'END-of-openldev/pkg-plist'
Xbin/openldev
Xbin/openldev_launcher
Xlib/libopenldev.la
Xlib/libopenldev.so
Xlib/libopenldev.so.0
Xlib/openldev/insertinfo.plugin
Xlib/openldev/libinsertinfo.la
Xlib/openldev/libinsertinfo.so
Xlib/openldev/libmakefileeditor.la
Xlib/openldev/libmakefileeditor.so
Xlib/openldev/makefileeditor.plugin
Xshare/applications/openldev.desktop
Xshare/doc/openldev/AUTHORS
Xshare/doc/openldev/COPYING
Xshare/doc/openldev/ChangeLog
Xshare/doc/openldev/INSTALL
Xshare/doc/openldev/NEWS
Xshare/doc/openldev/README
Xshare/doc/openldev/TODO
Xshare/openldev/glade/environment.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/importproject.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/inserttimedate.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/mfeditor-add.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/mfeditor-prefix.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/mfeditor-script.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/mfeditor-subproject.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/mfeditor-target.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/mfeditor-variable.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/newfile.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/projectinfo.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/projectproperties.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/replace.glade
Xshare/openldev/glade/tip.glade
Xshare/openldev/menus/mainmenu.ui
Xshare/openldev/menus/popup_menus.ui
Xshare/openldev/menus/toolbar.ui
Xshare/openldev/templates/console-c.pl
Xshare/openldev/templates/console-cxx.pl
Xshare/openldev/templates/gtk.pl
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/build.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/build_sm.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/compile.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/compile_sm.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/error.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/info.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/mfeditor-directory.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/mfeditor-prefix.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/mfeditor-script.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/mfeditor-target.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/mfeditor-variable.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/newproject.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/openldev24.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/openldev48.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/openldev96.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/projectinfo.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/splash.png
Xshare/pixmaps/openldev/warning.png
X@dirrm share/pixmaps/openldev
X@dirrm share/openldev/templates
X@dirrm share/openldev/menus
X@dirrm share/openldev/glade
X@dirrm share/openldev
X@dirrm share/doc/openldev
X@dirrmtry share/applications
X@dirrm lib/openldev
END-of-openldev/pkg-plist
exit
